allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('model:', d.get\('model'\)\); print\('theme:', d.get\('theme'\)\); print\('effortLevel:', d.get\('effortLevel'\)\); print\('plugins:', list\(d.get\('enabledPlugins',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('permissions:', len\(d.get\('permissions',{}\).get\('allow',[]\)\)\)")
